name: vendor-analytics-platform
description: Unified launcher for Vendor Analytics & Retail Intelligence Platform

scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,AI-SERVICE,FRONTEND" -c "blue.bold,magenta.bold,cyan.bold" "cd backend && npm start" "cd ai_service && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,AI-SERVICE,FRONTEND" -c "blue.bold,magenta.bold,cyan.bold" "cd backend && npm start" "cd ai_service && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
